Do you need a refresher at all as far as like how the pricing structure works.
lines.name: Alexander Tran

lines.content: Yeah, the quick version is that you're just gonna be charged an hourly rate and then you're going to be charged for whatever you end up paying for in, in the packing materials. You're not charged for the moving blankets or the stretch wrap, you're not charged for any disassemble or reassembly. What I'm talking about packing, I'm strictly just talking about packing up boxes. So we'll bring a surplus, make sure we have more than enough on-hand. But we only charge you for whatever you actually end up utilizing. So, if you have your own boxes, you want us to start with, that can be a great way to kind of undercut the cost there. But if not, we'll have more than enough to make sure we get everything boxed up for you typically on average based on your square footage. We would expect that number to fall anywhere closer to about like $550 to about some $650. So, if I quote you for that $640. I think that should be a reliable top end for what you would expect to see for a supply charge there.
lines.name: Alexander Tran

lines.content: And then, from their hourly rate is going to be prorated based on actual time used, whether it's the pack date or whether it's to move date so, if they don't utilize a full eight hour day they're closer to six hours, then that's what you're gonna end up paying for. It's just whatever you actually used to that nearest fifteen minutes. The only real difference that happened between now and whenever you last used us is that we do have variable pricing. Meaning, if you have the flexibility then you can save a pretty, depending on this move. Just by being able to schedule out on a, on a better value day where the hourly rate is lower, Saturday is going to be the highest rate. Friday is, is slightly reduced but still still pretty up there Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday is where it's at. And Sunday, Monday is is also a very good value day as well.

lines.content: Did you have an idea of when you wanted to, to, to handle the pack and the move day just so, I can quote you based on the relevant rates for that day.
